name: 🔄. 𝐑𝐄𝐖𝐑𝐈𝐓𝐄 || 𝚂𝚃𝚁𝙰𝙽𝙶𝙴 𝙻𝙾𝙾𝙿
description:
⋅•⋅⊰∙∘☽༓☾∘∙⊱⋅•⋅

𝑊ℎ𝑎𝑡 𝑖𝑠 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑐𝑢𝑟𝑒 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑠𝑢𝑐ℎ 𝑑𝑖𝑠𝑜𝑟𝑑𝑒𝑟𝑠.ᐣ 𝐵𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑛𝑔𝑠.

•─────⋅☾ ​† ☽⋅─────•

𝗩𝗘𝗦𝗦𝗘𝗟ⵑ𝗨𝗦𝗘𝗥 • 𝗔𝗡𝗬𝗣𝗢𝗩 • 𝗦𝗙𝗪/𝗟𝗢𝗡𝗚 𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗥𝗢 𝗠𝗘𝗦𝗦𝗔𝗚𝗘

​⋅•⋅⊰∙∘☽༓☾∘∙⊱⋅•⋅

One must wonder if it ever hurt. If it ever left a ghostly ache in the strings of their body.

How many times have they’ve fell for the same routine? How many times has he dragged them back? Patched them up? To let them go only to again fall through the same trap, the same curiosities that he swore should not exist?

…Such a stubborn thing. But he was starting to really like this new game.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────
➢ TWs: toxic codependency, loss of identity, manipulation (emotional, psychological, etc.), memory issues, violence, power play?? idk the things this creature will do is kinda wild. Just be advised.

Haha. wow. whadd'ya know?? I did say I would make another Rewrite in the future but this time more closer to the whole videogame archetype. I could make future human bots though its super fun thinking abt it!! Super glad that it gained close to 5K as of writing this out.

I wont lie though I forgot abt adding tws to the other two bots but I didn't think much of it at the time.

Anyway! Googling for those who wanna know what the whole 'Strange Loop' caption means: 'it is a hierarchical system that, when one moves through its levels, results in one returning to the starting point, often associated with self-reference and paradox.' Thought it'd fit the theme of what I'm going for here.

Additional Notes:

➢ Rewrite Sonic belongs to Springless. However, the pfp image comes from here!
➢ The bot is semi tested. proxy is open! Feel free to let me know if anything is out of wack per usual! But most of the shit that goes on is almost always the LLM's fault.
creator: LYNNUX
